name: Arroz Con Pollo (Chicken with Yellow Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove all skin from chicken. Rinse the chicken and sprinkle with lemon juice and orange juice.
2. Prepare a sofrito by combining chopped green pepper, chopped onion, minced garlic, bay leaf, ground pepper, bijol, tomato sauce, and olive oil. Cook over medium-high heat in a large pot for five minutes, stirring frequently. Lower the heat and add chicken pieces, cooking each side for three minutes.
3. Add salt, cooking wine, juice from canned peas, juice from canned asparagus, and 1 1/2 cups of water. Poach the chicken (covered) over medium-high heat for 30 minutes, or until tender. Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
4. Add 2 cups rice to the pot and bring to boil (covered), ensuring there is enough liquid in the pot to cook the rice. You may need to add more water. Reduce heat and cook rice (approximately 30 minutes). When rice is nearly cooked, add 1/2 bottle of beer to rice and stir well. Rice should remain moist.
5. Add chicken back to the rice and simmer for five minutes. Correct salt to taste and serve garnished with peas, asparagus, and pimentos.
